entity.summary: Cosmos/Terra ecosystem automated market maker and decentralized exchange protocol. HEI treats Astroport as one protocol-level DEX entity and records Terra/Neutron/Terra 2.0 rows as deployments or variants rather than separate v0 entities.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0137 through hei_unadded_0141 as one entity to avoid chain/version duplication.

events.title: Astroport launch treated as DEX start
events.description: Astroport is recorded as a protocol-level AMM/DEX entity with multiple deployment and version rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Launch date and Terra history should be refined later with stronger primary launch and migration sources.

evidence.title: Astroport official website
evidence.notes: Official domain used to preserve current Astroport identity.

evidence.title: Astroport documentation
evidence.notes: Official documentation used for protocol-level identity.

evidence.title: DefiLlama / CoinGecko / CoinPaprika references for Astroport variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0137-0141 contained Astroport deployment/version references.
